data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Reduces the number of options to enhance user decision-making process.
data.technical_spec: Simplified user interfaces with fewer, clearly defined options.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizes interaction elements based on size and distance for user ease.
data.technical_spec: Design interfaces with easily tappable targets, especially on mobile.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Limits information delivery to prevent cognitive overload.
data.technical_spec: Breakdowns content into smaller, more manageable sections.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related items closely to suggest relationships.
data.technical_spec: Designs UI elements in clusters for related tasks.

data.title: Law of Prägnanz
data.description: Designs interfaces with simplicity and clarity, avoiding unnecessary complexity.
data.technical_spec: Ensures UI elements are simple and predictable for eased navigation.
